channel.title: Random Access Memories
channel.description: Recent content on Random Access Memories

item.title: About
item.description: Hi I’m Giulio. I currently work as a Threat Hunter for an AV company. I have a MSc in Cybersecurity from Sapienza University of Rome. Thesis here. My BSc is in Systems and Network Security from the University of Milan. Thesis here In 2018 I took part in a research project on the security of avionics protocols at University of Jyväskylä, Finland. I have a strong passion for technology, security and programming.
